title: systemtest: inpsect container image different from current platform arch
body:
When --raw is provided, can inspect show the raw manifest list, w/o
requiring any particular platform to be present, this test case is
used for make sure inspect command w/ --raw option works well for
container image is different from current platform arch.

$ bats -f "diff platform" systemtest/010-inspect.bats
 ✓ inspect: image manifest list w/ diff platform

1 test, 0 failures

Signed-off-by: Alex Jia <chuanchang.jia@gmail.com>

comments.body:
LGTM
@mtrmac @vrothberg @giuseppe Can we get this merged. Just adding a new test.
